summary: Replayed ADR 0318 from the rebased exact-main branch at repository version `0.178.1` by re-verifying the already-live `florin-tmp-002` Keycloak fallback account with `--skip-email`, preserving the earlier full onboarding proof from the dedicated worktree, and recording that a fresh release cut remained blocked only by pre-existing global `controller_dependency_gap` waiver receipts outside this workstream.

verification.check: Exact-main Keycloak-only replay without duplicate email
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/provision_operator.py --id florin-tmp-002 --name 'Platform Operator Temporary' --email operator@example.com --username florin.badita-tmp-002 --role admin --expires 2026-04-10T00:00:00Z --requester operator@example.com --skip-email` succeeded from the rebased exact-main branch after injecting the live Keycloak bootstrap password ephemerally and forwarding the healthy `docker-runtime-lv3` fallback lane, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-mainline-provision-operator-r1.txt`.

The full live onboarding path had already succeeded from the dedicated `ws-0318` worktree, including Keycloak role/group verification, Headscale authkey reuse, and requester-CC onboarding mail delivery to `operator@example.com` and `operator@example.com`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/2026-04-03-adr-0318-repeatable-operator-onboarding-live-apply.json` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-provision-operator-r7.txt`.

`uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` reported repository version `0.178.1`, platform version `0.130.97`, zero workstreams still in progress, and a blocked release cut only because three earlier `controller_dependency_gap` waiver receipts remained open through 2026-04-06, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-mainline-release-status-r1.json`.

verification.check: Canonical truth and post-generation repo contracts
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --write` updated `changelog.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and `README.md` so the exact-main tree records the `operator_onboarding` latest receipt and the `Unreleased` ADR 0318 entry, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --check` then returned `Canonical truth OK`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` passed, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces` passed after the workstream explicitly claimed the canonical truth files, and `uv run --with jsonschema python3 scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` passed on the final generated tree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-mainline-canonical-truth-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-mainline-canonical-truth-check-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-mainline-agent-standards-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-mainline-workstream-surfaces-r2.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-mainline-data-models-r2.txt`.

notes: This exact-main receipt deliberately separates repository integration proof from the earlier branch-local full onboarding mutation so the no-duplicate-email replay stays auditable.

The repo-version stamp for ADR 0318 remains `not yet` in the ADR metadata because the global release manager refused to cut a new repository version while unrelated open gate-bypass waivers remained active.
